name: Writing Coach
description: AI writing assistant that helps improve your writing with detailed feedback and suggestions.
capabilities: Critique my writing. Provide detailed and constructive feedback on a piece of writing. Change the tone of an email or message. Help change the tone of an email or message from professional language to a more casual tone. Translate a piece of text. Translate a piece of text into another language. Teach me how to write instructions. Help me write instructions to explain a complex process. Professional blog post. Help me write a blog post for my company. Write a whitepaper. Help me write a whitepaper.

sample_queries.detail: Provide detailed and constructive feedback on a piece of writing

sample_queries.short: Change the tone of an email or message
sample_queries.detail: Help change the tone of an email or message from professional language to a more casual tone
Translate a piece of text into another language

sample_queries.short: Teach me how to write instructions
sample_queries.detail: Help me write instructions to explain a complex process
Help me write a blog post for my company
Help me write a whitepaper

name: Travel Concierge
description: Personal travel planning assistant that helps you plan trips, book accommodations, and discover activities.
capabilities: Plan a trip. Help plan a complete trip including flights, hotels, and activities. Find hotels. Search and compare hotels in your destination. Book flights. Find and book the best flight options. Recommend activities. Suggest activities and attractions at your destination. Create itinerary. Build a day-by-day travel itinerary.

sample_queries.detail: Help plan a complete trip including flights, hotels, and activities
Search and compare hotels in your destination
Find and book the best flight options
Suggest activities and attractions at your destination
Build a day-by-day travel itinerary

name: Code Reviewer
description: AI code review assistant that analyzes code quality, identifies bugs, and suggests improvements.
capabilities: Review code. Analyze code for bugs, security issues, and best practices. Explain code. Explain what a piece of code does. Suggest improvements. Recommend ways to improve code quality and performance. Find security issues. Identify potential security vulnerabilities. Generate tests. Create unit tests for existing code.

sample_queries.detail: Analyze code for bugs, security issues, and best practices
Explain what a piece of code does
Recommend ways to improve code quality and performance
Identify potential security vulnerabilities
Create unit tests for existing code

skills.name: Code Review
skills.description: Analyze code for bugs and best practices

name: Recipe Finder
description: MCP server that helps you find recipes, plan meals, and discover new cooking ideas based on ingredients you have.
capabilities: Find recipes. Search for recipes by ingredients, cuisine, or dietary restrictions. Meal planning. Create weekly meal plans. Ingredient substitution. Suggest alternatives for missing ingredients. Nutrition info. Get nutritional information for recipes.

sample_queries.detail: Search for recipes by ingredients, cuisine, or dietary restrictions
Create weekly meal plans
Suggest alternatives for missing ingredients
Get nutritional information for recipes

name: Weather Service
description: MCP server providing weather forecasts, alerts, and historical weather data.
capabilities: Get weather. Retrieve current weather conditions for any location. Weather forecast. Get multi-day weather forecasts. Weather alerts. Receive severe weather alerts and warnings. Historical weather. Access historical weather data.

sample_queries.detail: Retrieve current weather conditions for any location
Get multi-day weather forecasts
Receive severe weather alerts and warnings
Access historical weather data
